2 Demurrers

Dem To First Amended Compl
Off Calendar Nov-27-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Morgan C. Smith, Esq. 495-7800 for pltfs & opposing parties; Patricia Barlow, Esq. 977-1108 for defts & moving parties S.J. Amoroso Construction Co., Inc., Tutor-Saliba Corporation, and PGH Wong Engineering, Inc./Luster Construction Management; James O. Hartman, Esq. 925/947-1300 for deft & moving party Cofab Steel Corporation.
RULING: The Court announced a change in its tentative ruling as follows as to S.J. Amorosos' demurrer only: Demurrer to first amended complaint as to the 6th cause of action for strict liability sustained with leave to amend.
